title: Samui Nature Trail & Wildlife Walk
shortDesc: Easy jungle trails through Samui's interior — spot tropical birds, butterflies, and wildlife.
description: Koh Samui's jungle interior is full of life — tropical birds, butterflies, lizards, squirrels, and if you're lucky, monkeys. These easy guided nature walks take families through shaded jungle paths at a relaxed pace. Guides point out medicinal plants, exotic insects, and local wildlife. A brilliant way to show kids the natural side of Thailand beyond the beach.
